title: Review: Space methods (get, changes, create, join, update, destroy, query)
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Public API surface is large (SpaceUpdateInput has 11 fields, SpaceJoinInput has a type-level XOR gap), and the incomplete Space/set patch key coverage creates a user-facing functionality gap with no filed follow-up.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: (1) space_join space_id wire path is untested at body level — the conditional logic in space_join is simple and correct on inspection but has no test oracle; (2) space_set_update has no test for member/channel patch keys — the addMembers/addChannels serialization is visually correct but untested at the wire level. Would raise confidence if: body_json matchers were added to Tests 48, 51, and a new Test 56 for the space_id join path; and a test exercising addMembers/addChannels in space_set_update were added.
